package:
mycobot_gazebo 0.0.0 Gazebo simulation support for mycobot robots including worlds and launch files ubuntu BSD-3-Clause
ament_cmake
controller_manager # supervisor for ros2_control gripper_controllers # ready to use controllers for open and close gripper gz_msgs_vendor # gazebo message definitions gz_ros2_control # bridge between ros2_control and gazebo python3-numpy # for math operations rclcpp # ros2 client library for c++ ros_gz # connect ros2 with the latest version of gazebo ros_gz_bridge # bridge between ros2 and gazebo, so they can talk to each other ros_gz_image # bridge for images between ros2 and gazebo ros_gz_sim # ros2 interface for gazebo, so we can control gazebo from ros2 ros2_control # ros2 framework for controlling robots ros2_controllers # ready to use controllers for ros2_control trajectory_msgs # for sending trajectory commands to the robot xacro # for creating robot models gz_ros2_control_demos # ready to use gazebo worlds and launch files for ros2_control ß ament_lint_auto ament_lint_common
ament_cmake
